_bk;t=1780616461342~~~ Running global checkout hook

_bk;t=1780616461366
_bk;t=1780616461366if [ ! -d "${BUILDKITE_BUILD_CHECKOUT_PATH}/.git" ]; then
_bk;t=1780616461366    echo "--- Init clone and checkout" 
_bk;t=1780616461366    COUNT=1
_bk;t=1780616461366    while true; do
_bk;t=1780616461366        git clone ${BUILDKITE_GIT_CLONE_FLAGS} ${BUILDKITE_REPO} "${BUILDKITE_BUILD_CHECKOUT_PATH}"
_bk;t=1780616461366        if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
_bk;t=1780616461366            break
_bk;t=1780616461366        fi
_bk;t=1780616461366        if [[ $COUNT -ge 3 ]]; then
_bk;t=1780616461366            echo "Clone ${BUILDKITE_REPO} failed after 3 attempts"
_bk;t=1780616461366            exit 1
_bk;t=1780616461366        else
_bk;t=1780616461366            echo "Clone ${BUILDKITE_REPO} failed, retrying..."
_bk;t=1780616461366            sleep 30s
_bk;t=1780616461366        fi 
_bk;t=1780616461366        let COUNT=COUNT+1
_bk;t=1780616461366    done
_bk;t=1780616461366    cd "${BUILDKITE_BUILD_CHECKOUT_PATH}"
_bk;t=1780616461366    if [ "$BUILDKITE_COMMIT" = "HEAD" ]; then
_bk;t=1780616461366        git checkout -f "${BUILDKITE_BRANCH}"
_bk;t=1780616461366    else
_bk;t=1780616461366        git checkout -f "${BUILDKITE_COMMIT}"
_bk;t=1780616461366    fi
_bk;t=1780616461366    # emulate https://github.com/buildkite/agent/blob/7e0166eebed5bf3cc289edae97145803429e75f9/bootstrap/bootstrap.go#L1448-L1458
_bk;t=1780616461366    if ! buildkite-agent meta-data exists "buildkite:git:commit" ; then
_bk;t=1780616461366        echo "Sending Git commit information to Buildkite"
_bk;t=1780616461366        git --no-pager show HEAD -s --format=fuller --no-color -- | buildkite-agent meta-data set "buildkite:git:commit"
_bk;t=1780616461366    fi
_bk;t=1780616461366else
_bk;t=1780616461366    echo "--- Using cached git repo ${BUILDKITE_BUILD_CHECKOUT_PATH}"
_bk;t=1780616461366    cd "${BUILDKITE_BUILD_CHECKOUT_PATH}"
_bk;t=1780616461366fi
